market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Coinbase’s Base launches AI tool for ChatGPT to manage crypto wallets and DeFi apps
articles.description: The product, called Base MCP, connects a user’s Base Account to AI clients such as ChatGPT, Claude and Cursor using the Model Context Protocol (MCP), an emerging standard that allows AI systems to securely interface with external tools and applications.

articles.title: This startup is betting India’s gig economy can train the world’s robots
articles.description: Human Archive, a startup founded by Berkeley and Stanford researchers, is paying gig workers in India to wear camera-equipped caps and sensor devices to collect the real-world physical training data that AI and robotics labs are racing to acquire.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: XRPL could close its biggest DeFi gap if new AMM amendment passes
articles.description: A draft proposal filed Tuesday would extend the XRP Ledger's native automated market maker with three swappable curve types, giving liquidity providers more efficient ways to deploy capital and closing one of XRPL DeFi's longest-standing gaps.

articles.title: Ghost hackers: the cybersecurity mystery that nobody has solved
articles.description: A shadowy group that stole and dumped the NSA’s most powerful hacking tools still has implications for how companies think about digital risk today.

articles.title: Iranian hackers blamed for breach of Los Angeles transit system that took weeks to recover
articles.description: An Israeli cybersecurity firm said Iran’s government is behind Ababil of Minab, a fake hacktivist persona that has claimed a series of data breaches after the start of the war in Iran.

articles.title: AI guardrail removals raise questions over limits of open-source model regulation
articles.description: Financial Times testing found safety controls on open AI models from Meta and Google could be stripped in minutes, raising governance concerns.

articles.title: The Clarity Act won’t lead to adoption without crypto tax reform
articles.description: The legislation is being framed as a turning point for U.S. crypto policy, but there’s a major piece of the puzzle being overlooked, argues Singh.

articles.title: Ferrari’s first EV is not for you
articles.description: The Ferrari Luce seems to be more aimed at regulatory compliance and China, putting a lot of pressure on the Jony Ive-designed EV.

articles.title: Strategy buys back $1.5B of debt at discount, cuts outstanding notes to $6.7B
articles.description: Strategy reduced aggregate convertible notes outstanding to $6.7 billion after repurchasing 2029 notes for $1.38 billion in cash.

articles.title: Grvt adds 3 tokenized yield funds tied to institutional-grade RWAs
articles.description: Grvt will work with Plume to launch tokenized fixed-income and structured credit products tied to institutional-grade real world assets and onchain yield strategies.

articles.title: Universal Music Group and TikTok renew agreement to combat unauthorized AI music
articles.description: For years, UMG has pushed platforms, streaming services, and AI companies to implement stricter content moderation policies

articles.title: RWA market hits $51B as tokenized private credits surges: Bernstein
articles.description: Bernstein Research data shows the RWA market at $51 billion, with tokenized private credit leading and Figure leading RWA platforms with $18 billion in tokenized assets.

articles.title: TeraWulf jumps 13% on AI data center expansion in Kentucky
articles.description: The bitcoin miner turned HPC infrastructure developer unveiled plans for a new 1 gigawatt facility in Kentucky aimed at servicing AI workloads.

articles.title: Live markets: bitcoin on sidelines as markets surge on Iran peace hopes
articles.description: Oil prices and bond yields have opened the week sharply lower following President Trump's weekend announcement of an imminent Middle East agreement.

articles.title: 宇宙的發光水晶球！NGC 1514 星雲最新影像揭露「雙星系統」造景祕密
articles.description: 位於夏威夷毛納基山山頂、口徑 8.1 公尺的北雙子望遠鏡（Gemini North Telescope），近日 […]

articles.title: Spotify now lets you stream narrated magazine articles, too
articles.description: Spotify is adding narrated magazine articles to its app as it expands beyond music into audiobooks, podcasts, AI audio, and more.

articles.title: Bitcoin’s big cup-and-handle pattern targets ‘minimum’ $220K BTC price
articles.description: Bitcoin cup-and-handle chart breakout targets $220,000, but BTC price must first hold the $74,000 support area.

articles.title: Ethereum treasury firms lean on staking as ETF pressure builds: Report
articles.description: Everstake said staking made up 60% of disclosed revenue among six Ethereum treasury firms, while loss-making companies posted $1.41 billion in losses.

articles.title: Bitmine made its largest ETH purchase this year despite Tom Lee's slowdown suggestion
articles.description: The company bought 111,942 ether last week worth $237 million, ramping up purchases to take advantage of ETH's drop below $2,200.
